name: query-aitm-prt
bodyMarkdown:
# AiTM Device PRT Enrollment Detection Query

**Category:** Detection Chokepoints | **Maturity:** Hunt | **FP Rate:** Low
**Techniques:** T1098.005 | **Log Sources:** Entra ID AuditLogs

```kql
AuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| where OperationName == "Add registered users to device"
| where ResultType == 0
| where tostring(InitiatedBy) !has "Dsreg" and tostring(InitiatedBy) !has "DeviceRegistrationClient" and tostring(InitiatedBy) !has "Dalvik"
| project TimeGenerated, OperationName, ResultType, InitiatedBy, TargetResources
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
```
